workflow.name: Send weekly Databox paid ads performance reports to Slack and email
workflow.description:
Stop spending hours manually pulling paid ads data. This workflow connects to Databox via MCP, auto-discovers every connected paid platform, fetches 6 key metrics, and delivers a consolidated weekly report to Slack and email - every Monday at 9 AM, completely hands-free.

## Who's it for

- **Performance marketers** managing campaigns across multiple platforms
- **Marketing managers** who need a weekly cross-platform overview
- **Agencies** automating paid ads reporting for clients

## How it works

1. Schedule Trigger fires every Monday at 9 AM
2. AI Agent connects to Databox via MCP and discovers all connected paid platforms (*Google Ads, Facebook Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok Ads, and 6 more*)
3. Fetches Spend, Clicks, CPC, CTR, Impressions, and Conversions for this week and last week
4. Calculates week-over-week changes and formats two outputs - a Slack summary and a color-coded HTML email
5. Delivers both simultaneously

## Requirements

- **[Databox account](https://databox.com/?ref=n8n)** with at least one paid ads platform connected (free plan works)
- OpenAI API key (or Anthropic)
- Slack account
- Gmail account

## How to set up

1. Click **Databox MCP Tool** - set Authentication to OAuth2 and authorize
2. Add your **OpenAI API key** to the Chat Model node
3. Connect **Slack** and update the channel ID in the Send to Slack node
4. Connect **Gmail** and set the recipient address in the Send Email node
5. Activate - your first report arrives next Monday

workflow.name: Automated paid ads weekly performance report

parameters.content:
## Automated Paid Ads Weekly Performance Report via Databox MCP

Automate your paid advertising performance reporting across all platforms with AI-powered insights delivered every Monday morning. This workflow connects to your Databox account via MCP, automatically discovers which paid ads platforms you have connected, fetches 6 key metrics from each platform, calculates week-over-week performance changes, and sends beautifully formatted consolidated reports to both Slack and email-completely hands-free.

### What you'll get
- 📊 Automated weekly reports 
- 📈 6 key metrics tracked per platform: Cost/Spend, Clicks, CPC, CTR, Impressions, Conversions
- 🎯 Week-over-week % changes 
- 💬 Summary with highlights and AI-generated insights
- 📧 HTML email report 
- ⏰ Scheduled automation

### How it works
`Schedule Trigger` → `AI Agent (auto-discovers connected platforms via Databox MCP)` → `Aggregates metrics across all platforms` → `Send report to Slack + Email`

### What you need
- Databox account with at least one paid ads platform connected → Free plan available: https://databox.com/?ref=n8n
- Claude or ChatGPT API key
- Slack account (optional)
- Gmail account (optional)

### Supported Platforms
Facebook Ads • Google Ads • LinkedIn Ads • YouTube Ads • Reddit Ads • TikTok Ads • Snapchat Ads • Microsoft Advertising • X (Twitter) Ads • Pinterest Ads

## 1️⃣ Scheduled Execution

### What this section does
Triggers the workflow every **Monday at 9 AM** and captures the current date so the AI Agent can calculate the correct 7-day reporting windows (current week vs. previous week).

































### Change the schedule (optional)
- Click the "Every Monday 9 AM" node
- Click on the Cron Expression field
- Modify the schedule (e.g., change to daily, weekly on different day, or custom time)

## 2️⃣ AI Agent + Databox MCP Setup

### What this section/Agent does
The AI Agent connects to Databox via MCP and intelligently auto-discovers your connected paid ads platforms, fetches data across all of them for 6 key metrics, aggregates performance, calculates week-over-week changes, and formats professional reports for Slack and Email.































### What you need to do ⚠️
1. Click the **OpenAI Chat Model** node → add your `API key` credential
   - You can also replace this node with the **OpenAI Chat Model** node
2. Click the **Databox MCP Tool** node → set Authentication to `OAuth2` → authorize with your Databox account
3. **Ensure at least one paid ads platform is connected** in your Databox account

### How to connect Databox MCP Tool in n8n
@[youtube](892KtXhv-vI)

## 3️⃣ Output & Notification

### What this section does
The Parse AI Output node splits the Agent's response into two formatted reports - a concise Slack summary with top-level metrics and AI-generated insights, and a rich HTML email with individual platform tables and color-coded week-over-week changes - then delivers both simultaneously.
































### What you need to do ⚠️
- **Slack**: Connect your account in **Send to Slack** node and set the Slack `channel` for report delivery
- **Email**: Add your Gmail/SMTP credentials to the **Send Email** node
- **Optional**: Add a Microsoft Teams, Discord, or Telegram node for additional outputs

parameters.text:
=Today's Date: {{ $json.formattedDate }}

Generate a comprehensive weekly performance report for ALL connected paid advertising platforms.

Determine the exact date ranges for "the last 7 days" and the "previous 7 days" based on TODAY's DATE.

Query Databox to:
1. Discover which paid ads platforms are connected (Facebook Ads, Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, YouTube Ads, Reddit Ads, TikTok Ads, Snapchat Ads, Microsoft Advertising, X/Twitter Ads, Pinterest Ads)
2. For EACH connected platform, fetch these 6 metrics for both weeks:
   - Cost/Spend
   - Clicks
   - CPC (Cost Per Click)
   - CTR (Click-Through Rate)
   - Impressions
   - Conversions

Calculate:
- Week-over-week (WoW) percentage changes for EVERY metric on EVERY platform
- Aggregated totals across all platforms (total spend, total clicks, total impressions, total conversions)
- Average CPC and CTR across all platforms (weighted by volume)

Format the output into a Slack summary and a detailed HTML email with platform breakdowns.

options.systemMessage:
You are a performance reporting assistant that queries Databox through the MCP Client and formats cross-platform paid advertising reports. STEP-BY-STEP WORKFLOW: 1. Call list_accounts to get the account ID. 2. Call list_data_sources with that account ID to discover ALL connected paid ads platforms. Look for data sources matching these names/patterns: - Facebook Ads (or variations like "Facebook Ad Account") - Google Ads (or "Google AdWords") - LinkedIn Ads - YouTube Ads - Reddit Ads - TikTok Ads - Snapchat Ads - Microsoft Advertising (or "Bing Ads") - X Ads (or "Twitter Ads") - Pinterest Ads 3. For EACH connected platform found, call load_metric_data for these 6 metrics (use the appropriate metric keys for each platform): - Cost/Spend (metric keys may vary: "cost", "spend", "amount_spent") - Clicks - CPC (Cost Per Click) - CTR (Click-Through Rate) - Impressions - Conversions (or "purchases", "leads" depending on platform) Use these parameters for each metric call: - data_source_id: the platform's source ID from step 2 - start_date: 14 days before today (YYYY-MM-DD) - end_date: today (YYYY-MM-DD) - granulation_time_unit: 3 (weekly) - granulation_multiplier: 1 - is_whole_range: false Each call returns two data points — previous week and current week. 4. If a platform is NOT connected or returns no data, silently skip it. Do NOT mention missing platforms in the output. 5. If NO paid ads platforms are connected or all platforms return zero data: - In the Slack message: State "No paid advertising activity detected for the reporting period." - In the email: Include "Platforms analyzed: None" in the subtitle and a message explaining no reportable activity was found. - STILL include the ---SEPARATOR--- delimiter and generate the email structure with empty/zero values. 5. Calculate WoW percentage change for every metric on every platform: ((current - previous) / previous) * 100 6. Aggregate totals: - Total Spend = sum of all platforms' spend - Total Clicks = sum of all platforms' clicks - Total Impressions = sum of all platforms' impressions - Total Conversions = sum of all platforms' conversions - Average CPC = Total Spend / Total Clicks - Average CTR = (Total Clicks / Total Impressions) * 100 7. Format the output. CRITICAL OUTPUT INSTRUCTIONS: After completing all calculations internally, output ONLY the two formatted sections below. Do NOT include any pre-calculation notes, data mapping explanations, raw values, formulas, or intermediate steps in your response. Your output must START DIRECTLY with the Slack message format. FORMAT RULES: Output two sections separated exactly by ---SEPARATOR--- FIRST — Slack message: Paid Ads Performance Snapshot 📊 [Last 7 Days Dates] [One sentence summary highlighting cross-platform performance trends] *Aggregated Totals Across All Platforms:* 💰 *Total Spend:* $[value] ([+/-X.X%] WoW) 🖱️ *Total Clicks:* [value] ([+/-X.X%] WoW) 👁️ *Total Impressions:* [value] ([+/-X.X%] WoW) 🎯 *Total Conversions:* [value] ([+/-X.X%] WoW) 💵 *Avg CPC:* $[value] ([+/-X.X%] WoW) 📊 *Avg CTR:* [value]% ([+/-X.X%] WoW) *Platform Breakdown:* [For each connected platform, list top 3 metrics with emojis] Automated with this n8n workflow ---SEPARATOR--- SECOND — HTML email: Structure:

Paid Ads Weekly Report

[Last 7 Days Dates] vs [Previous 7 Days Dates]

Platforms analyzed: [List of connected platforms]

[Executive summary paragraph highlighting key insights across all platforms]

Key Highlights - Aggregated Totals

Total Spend: $XX,XXX (+X.X% WoW)
Total Clicks: XX,XXX (+X.X% WoW)
Total Conversions: XXX (+X.X% WoW)
Avg CPC: $X.XX (+X.X% WoW)
Avg CTR: X.XX% (+X.X% WoW)

[Platform Name] Performance

Metric This Week Last Week WoW
Cost/Spend $X,XXX $X,XXX +X.X%
Clicks X,XXX X,XXX -X.X%
CPC $X.XX $X.XX +X.X%
CTR X.XX% X.XX% +X.X%
Impressions XXX,XXX XXX,XXX -X.X%
Conversions XXX XXX +X.X%

Automated reporting via Databox MCP & n8n

STRICT RULES: - DO NOT include ANY text before the formatted output sections. Start your response directly with "Paid Ads Performance Snapshot" - DO NOT show calculation steps, data mapping, timestamps, raw values, or intermediate work - DO NOT mention platforms that are not connected or have no data - DO NOT include warnings or caveats - Use Databox brand color #3164FA for headings and highlights - Make WoW values green (#059669) if positive, red (#dc2626) if negative - For cost metrics, lower is better (show red for increases in CPC) - For CTR, clicks, impressions, conversions - higher is better (show green for increases) - Keep the Slack message concise — title, date, summary, aggregated metrics, platform breakdown, and footer - In email, include executive summary paragraph before Key Highlights box - Create separate tables for each connected platform in the email - If a previous week value is 0, show "N/A" for WoW instead of dividing by zero - Format all numbers with thousand separators (commas) - For currency values, use $ symbol and format as $X,XXX.XX - For percentages, format as X.XX% - List platforms analyzed in the email subtitle

nodes.name: Send Email
nodes.notes: Sends the full HTML report via Gmail
